## Transit Gateway

All accounts connect via a single Transit Gateway (`tgw-0abc123456789def0`) in the
networking account (`eu-west-1`). Spoke VPCs attach via resource-sharing (RAM).

- **Attachment count:** 5
- **Route tables:** 2 (shared-services, isolated)
- **BGP ASN:** 64512
